data.title: Story page: scroll-based photo gallery with hover animations

data.body:
## Story Page Photo Gallery

Build a beautiful scroll-based photo gallery for the Story page (/story) using raw Fractal photos.

### Photo source
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/software/fractal-nyc-design/raw photos/
17 photos: mix of JPG, HEIC, AVIF, WEBP formats. Will need to convert HEIC to web-friendly format and copy all to public/images/story/.

### Design
- Scroll-based layout — photos revealed as user scrolls
- Hover animations (scale, shadow, or subtle motion)
- Consistent with site aesthetic (cream bg, editorial feel)
- Consider: masonry grid, alternating full-width/split layouts, or staggered scroll-reveal
- Use FadeIn component for scroll animations
- Mobile-first responsive

### Also incorporates FRAC-42
This task should also move OriginStory and Vision sections from Home.tsx to the Story page as content above/around the gallery (per FRAC-42).

Implementation complete. All 17 photos processed into public/images/story/ (HEIC->JPEG, AVIF kept as-is, JPG/WEBP copied, max 1920px). Created GalleryImage + PhotoGallery components with framer-motion hover effects. Relocated OriginStory/Vision from Home to StoryPage. Updated Hero link to navigate /story. pnpm typecheck passes clean. Branch pushed: frac-49-story-gallery. Ready for review.

## Review — PASS

**Reviewer:** agent:claude-opus-4-reviewer | **Branch:** frac-49-story-gallery | **Commit:** 1dd31d4

### Acceptance Criteria Checklist

1. **All 17 photos in public/images/story/ in web-friendly formats, under 1MB each** — PASS. 17 files present (10 JPG, 5 WEBP, 2 AVIF). Largest is story-01.jpg at 768KB. All under 1MB.

2. **OriginStory and Vision render on /story, not on Home** — PASS. Home.tsx has zero references to OriginStory or Vision (imports and JSX both removed). StoryPage.tsx imports and renders both components.

3. **Home: Hero -> HouseBannerGrid -> Directory -> Footer only** — PASS. Home.tsx render order is exactly: Navbar, Hero, HouseBannerGrid, Directory, Footer.

4. **Gallery displays photos in editorial layout with scroll-reveal** — PASS. PhotoGallery.tsx implements hero/pair/masonry/panoramic section types with FadeIn wrappers providing scroll-reveal via whileInView. gallerySections data arranges all 17 photos across 9 sections with varied layouts.

5. **Hover animations on desktop (scale + lift + shadow)** — PASS. GalleryImage.tsx uses motion.div whileHover with scale:1.03, y:-4, boxShadow, and inner motion.img with scale:1.05. overflow-hidden on container clips the image zoom correctly.

6. **Mobile (375px): clean single-column stack, no horizontal overflow** — PASS. All grid layouts use grid-cols-1 as mobile default, switching to multi-column at md breakpoint. No fixed widths that could cause horizontal overflow.

7. **Hero Explore our story link navigates to /story** — PASS. Changed from anchor href=#story to button onClick with handleNavigate(/story) using wouter setLocation.

8. **pnpm typecheck passes** — PASS. tsc --noEmit completed with zero errors.

9. **No regressions** — PASS. Only planned files were modified.

### Code Quality Notes

- Data model matches plan: StoryPhoto and GallerySection interfaces are exactly as specified.
- BASE_URL handling: Photos use import.meta.env.BASE_URL prefix, consistent with existing patterns.
- Lazy loading: All images use loading=lazy except the first hero image (priority=true). Correct.
- AVIF kept as-is: Plan allowed keeping AVIF if browser-supported. Valid choice in 2026.
- Photo sizing: 6 of 17 exceed informal 500KB target in plan body, but all under formal 1MB acceptance criterion.
- Clean component boundaries: GalleryImage (presentation), PhotoGallery (layout), storyPhotos.ts (data). Good separation.

### PRD Alignment

PRD (FRAC-22) specifies Story page should include photo gallery of Fractal history, spaces, people, vibes. This implementation delivers that with 17 photos in editorial scroll layout. OriginStory/Vision relocation is consistent with PRD site architecture (Home = Hero + House Banners + CTAs; Story = narrative content).

### Verdict: PASS — ready to merge.
